title: Matzo Egyptian All Purpose Flour Bake
description: Spicy, crispy, egg-free-friendly Egyptian dish made with all-purpose flour, perfect for meal prep.

ingredients.name: matzo meal
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets or online

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the all-purpose flour, matzo meal, cayenne pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, mix together the olive oil and water.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes, until smooth.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk.
Place the disks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each disk.
Brush the tops with a little water and sprinkle with paprika.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve warm.
